snippet.title: SUADERO DE TAQUERIA AUT√ČNTICO
snippet.description:
Tal y como los hacen en la taquer√≠a, hoy vamos a hacer tacos de suadero con todo y su salsa. SI. Para quienes nos ven desde ciudad sat√©lite, si es el. Es Julio de la taquer√≠a "tacos la hija del t√≠o"
Julio representa las personas que m√°s amamos en √©ste pa√≠s: nuestros taqueros. Tanto t√ļ como yo ya tenemos a nuestro taquero de cabecera, el que nos atiende y nos conoce, y el que cada vez que vamos nos da los tacos tal y como nos gusta, con el saz√≥n y sabor que queremos y que cada vez que vamos no nos defrauda. 
Pues hoy Julio nos ense√Ī√≥ c√≥mo hace sus tacos, y son tan f√°ciles como l√≥gicos. La l√≥gica de Julio es darle al comensal una carne que sepa a lo que es: CARNE. 
Por lo tanto usa ingredientes de la mejor calidad sin ponerles nada m√°s que ajo y sal, para que la carne sepa a lo que debe de saber. A carne!!

Si andan por sat√©lite y quieren visitar a Julio s√≥lo es cosa de que pongas en google o en waze "TACOS LA HIJA DEL T√ćO" est√° en avenida fuentes de sat√©lite #202 Colonia Santa Cruz del monte

Voy a estar posteando videos en facebook de c√≥mo hice yo el mismo suadero en sart√©n porque es importante decirlo: NO ES NECESARIA LA CHORICERA, quedan igualmente deliciosos en sart√©n (no lo hago con la misma agilidad que Julio pero de que salen, salen)

ingredientes: 
Suadero: lo cort√≥ en las capas que vienen en bisteces (el suadero es RES)
ajo
sal
manteca vegetal

Salsa:
tomate verde 1 kilo
100 gramos de chile de arbol asado
sal
cebolla
ajo

Julio llev√≥ las tortillas de taquero, y obvio se requiere cebolla y cilantro y limones. El hizo 4 kilos y salieron como 45, 50 taquitos. La verdad esos tacos no vieron la luz del d√≠a siguiente. 
Qu√© orgullo me da poder mostrarle al mundo una de nuestras delicias gastron√≥micas. Si est√°s en el extranjero y extra√Īas, ense√Īale al carnicero qu√© parte quieres de la res.
Consejo chilango: la torta de suadero pero yo no la hice, comi tacos desde el primero hasta que se termin√≥ la carne, taco tras taco, enchilada tras enchilada, kilos y kilos de lim√≥n, y cervezas tras cervezas, fu√© como la navidad del suadero, como mi cumplea√Īos, como mi d√≠a favorito
TE AMO JULIO!
#midiafavorito #juliomylove #tacosdesuadero

(LYRICS)
Verse

Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it don‚Äôt

Until you find home

This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it

And I don‚Äôt wanna feel, I don‚Äôt wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened, but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it.
 
Verse 2
Hello, it‚Äôs me your ex (again)
I didn‚Äôt want to call but there‚Äôs this pain in my chest
And thanks to you I‚Äôm wearing out this bulletproof vest but I‚Äôll be ok, I‚Äôm ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it don‚Äôt
Maybe we‚Äôll fix this or maybe we won‚Äôt 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
Don‚Äôt want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it 
And I don‚Äôt wanna feel, I don‚Äôt wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ain‚Äôt a heartbreak anthem, I don‚Äôt care what happened, but I ain‚Äôt got no time to dwell on it.

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Saturday (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots lyric video for "Saturday" from the album Scaled And Icy, available now on Fueled By Ramen.
Stream / Download Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

LYRICS
Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

Lose my sense a time or two
Weeks feel like days
Medicate in the afternoon.
And I just want to know
Have you lost your footing too?
I just pray that I'm not losing you.

Catch me floating circles in my fish bowl
Keep things fresh.
She said that I should change my clothes.
I exaggerate the life we used to know

Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

Ooh you're good.
These are my dancing shoes.
We paint the town.
Ooh you're good.
Thought I would dance with you.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

(Feeling great)
Life moves slow on the ocean floor.
(Feeling great)
I can't feel the waves anymore.
Did the tide forget to move?
I just pray that I'm not losing you.

Catch me floating circles in my fish bowl
Keep things fresh.
She said that I should change my clothes.
I exaggerate the life we used to know

Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Meet Squeak! - Brawler Spotlight
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support ‚ÄĒ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: GAME RECAP: Lakers 103, Warriors 100
snippet.description: The Lakers defeated the Warriors, 103-100. LeBron James recorded a triple-double with 22 points, 11 rebounds and 10 assists for the Lakers, including the go-ahead 3pt FG with 58.2 seconds remaining in regulation, while Anthony Davis added 25 points (20 in the 2nd half) and 12 rebounds in the victory. Stephen Curry led all scorers with 37 points and 7 rebounds for the Warriors in the losing effort.

snippet.title: The NBA Arrives In Fortnite
snippet.description:
Lace up... The Crossover is going to knock you off your feet. https://fn.gg/NBA

For the first time ever, the NBA is joining Fortnite! Coinciding with the debut of the State Farm NBA Play-In Tournament, Fortnite x NBA: The Crossover brings basketball‚Äôs best into the Item Shop and Fortnite Creative, and with Team Battles, a unique experience featuring all 30 NBA teams in Fortnite.

Debuting on May 21 at 8pm ET, players can suit up and rep any of the league's 30 teams. The In The Paint Set includes 31 uniforms, including all 30 NBA teams. 

Also available, grab the Shoot & Score Pack to get the Hookshot Emote and Mini Hoop Back Bling, which can feature the logo of all 30 NBA teams. When other players have the Mini Hoop Back Bling equipped, you‚Äôll be able to call your shot! 

If you‚Äôre more of a point guard, show off your handles with the Dribblin' traversal Emote.

#FortniteNBA #TheCrossover #FortniteNBATheCrossover
